Ender Rev Node

Category: Reverse Engineering
Difficulty: Medium

A legacy service node validates an activation key with layered byte transforms.
There is also a suspicious developer compatibility parser.
Reverse the bytecode to recover the real flag.

Run:
  java EnderRevNode
or
  java EnderRevNode "CH4KR4X2{example}"

Flag format:
  CH4KR4X2{...}
